originalTitle: Bond giant Pimco flexes muscles with private placements push
summary: Firm tries to capitalise on some borrowers’ need to raise cash as boundaries with public markets blur
content: Firm tries to capitalise on some borrowers’ need to raise cash as boundaries with public markets blur
chineseTitle: 债券巨头太平洋投资管理公司（Pimco）通过私募推动展示实力
chineseSummary: 随着公开市场的界限变得模糊，公司试图利用一些借款人筹集现金的需求
chineseContent: 随着公开市场的界限变得模糊，公司试图利用一些借款人筹集现金的需求
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
